schools.name: Cusco Academy of Advanced Studies
schools.description: CAAS is the llamaverse's oldest and most comprehensive research university, situated in the historic city of Cusco. Its GIS and geospatial sciences department pioneered the use of geospatial point-and-region queries for tracking llama movement patterns, a methodology now used by the national tracking network. Aaron completed his early education here before devoting himself full-time to chess.
notableAlumni: Miranda (chief data architect, Llamaville Urban Authority)
